overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night. The character moves from an outdoor plaza past various neon signs including TENGU and BRAIN DANCE, along sidewalks with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic, through areas with distinct pink neon lighting, passing by the Fuyutsuki building and various digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor plaza toward commercial building entrance

entered.detail: tables and chairs with white umbrellas in plaza area
large pink neon sign with Japanese character and TENGU text
green neon sign for SHIPLEY'S on building facade
pink neon sign reading BRAIN DANCE above entrance
pair of purple vending machines with THE LOVE text illuminated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an outdoor plaza with white umbrella seating. The camera moves toward a commercial building featuring prominent neon signs for TENGU, SHIPLEY'S, and BRAIN DANCE. The area is sparsely populated with pedestrians, and the scene is dominated by artificial neon lighting against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with prominent pink neon storefront

events.description: exiting plaza onto narrow city sidewalk alongside vehicle traffic
white sedan drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk following a pedestrian with red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white crop top walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign for PieZ shop with circular logo
orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character exits the plaza onto a narrow sidewalk enclosed by tall buildings. The PieZ shop's bright pink neon creates a distinct color zone. Orange traffic barriers line the street where sparse vehicle traffic passes by. The camera follows a pedestrian with red hair through this street canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with construction barriers and vehicle traffic

events.description: large yellow construction truck drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk as a construction vehicle passes

notable_agents.action: yellow construction truck with bright headlights driving down the street

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading TURBO above storefront entrance
orange and white striped construction barriers along sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the pink neon zone, the street opens slightly with the TURBO sign visible ahead. A large yellow construction truck passes by on the street, creating a momentary traffic event. The sidewalk continues with construction barriers lining the edge as pedestrians walk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: approaching corner with Fuyutsuki building and large digital advertisements
turning right at corner to proceed down new street section

agents.ego_description: walking toward intersection corner and turning right

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements
large red neon sign reading Fuyutsuki on building facade
palm trees in front of Fuyutsuki building entrance

segments.scene_description: The street widens as the character approaches a corner with large digital billboards. The prominent red Fuyutsuki neon sign marks a commercial building with palm trees out front. The camera turns right at the intersection, transitioning to a new street corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial corridor with towering neon signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding down street lined with tall commercial buildings and neon signs

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: towering skyscrapers with multiple neon signs and digital billboards
blue street vending machine with illuminated display screen

segments.scene_description: After turning the corner, the character proceeds down a downtown corridor lined with towering buildings covered in dense neon signage. A blue street vending machine stands on the left sidewalk. The street continues into the distance with more pedestrians walking ahead amid the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that evolves from an open plaza into a dense, towering downtown corridor. It begins in an outdoor plaza with white umbrella seating, moving toward a commercial building adorned with TENGU and BRAIN DANCE neon signs. As the camera exits the plaza, the environment narrows into a street canyon where the lighting shifts to a vivid pink glow from the PieZ shop and orange traffic barriers line the road. The scene then opens slightly as a large yellow construction truck passes by, leading the camera toward a wide intersection marked by digital billboards and the red Fuyutsuki sign. Finally, the camera turns right at the corner, proceeding down a deep city corridor lined with towering buildings, dense signage, and a blue vending machine.
